message:
test(search-core): add 13 tests for Tantivy schema and tokenizer

Expand tantivy_schema.rs from 11 to 24 tests covering:
- build_schema: deterministic field handles across calls
- schema_hash: 64 hex chars (SHA-256), short is prefix of full
- TOKENIZER_NAME: constant value assertion
- Tokenizer edge cases: empty input, unicode (café/résumé/naïve),
  punctuation splitting, 255-byte token kept, 256-byte token removed
- Multiple doc_kinds coexist in same index (message/agent/project)
- Body-only search finds content (subject unrelated)
- FieldHandles: Debug derive, Clone + Copy traits

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
